verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I look at myself in the mirror of the word I see so much to be fulfilled And I know I’ll bring to pass that glorious mystery If only I walk in his will And I know the way to certain victory Is to die the death to all that’s inside me So it’s not I that live but Christ who lives in me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me I can be all that God wants me to be I’ll fulfill the greater works I will bring his word to pass I’ll become that living reality I can do all things through Christ that strengthens me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There’s a challenge of this age But the promise to the bride is the stature of a perfect man And I know the way to reach that seventh step Is only through self sacrifice With the word of God deep inside me And the Holy Ghost to lead and guide me With my eyes fixed on the cross I count all things as naught It’s not my will but Thine and in His perfect strength I’ll find.
